title: We Can Source It Ltd - Black Paper Straws (8"/200mm) – Eco-Friendly, Biodegradable & Compostable – Durable Drinking Straws for Parties, Cocktails, Tumblers, Hot & Cold Drinks - Pack of 250

𝐅𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄 & 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓: These straws are comes in safe food-grade materials and these straws ensure clean and safe sipping every time. Our straws are easy to use and perfect for any occasion and giving you peace of mind with every drink.

𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘 & 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐘𝐂𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄: Our straws are made from high-quality paper. These straws break down naturally and fully compostable. These black paper straws are smart and sustainable choice that helps reduce plastic waste and protect the environment.

𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐎𝐂𝐂𝐀𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍: Our black paper straws are perfect for drinks and decoration also ideal for parties, weddings, BBQs, picnics, dessert tables and holiday celebrations. Their sleek black color adds a stylish touch to any event or everyday drink.

description: Product Description AVAILABLE IN These disposable white paper straws come unwrapped, ensuring hassle-free placement in the dispenser box. 5.5 inch 8 inch BLACK PAPER STRAWS For Hot and Cold Drinks These durable and sturdy paper drinking straws are crafted from premium quality paper that copes well with liquid and lasts for hours in beverages without getting soggy. These paper straws are thick. They are completely food-safe. They are completely reusable. Simple use and throw away. ENVIRONMENTAL STRAWS These reusable straws are fully compositable, a beverage accessory that can be used in a tumbler, cocktail glass or a glass of juice. COMPLETELY DURABLE These paper straws have a thick coating that makes them durable enough to last for hours in liquids. SUITABLE FOR HOT & COLD The paper straws have been tested to be suitable for use in both hot and cold cocktails. Perfect for those warming Christmas drinks or cooling summer spritzes! STRENGTH AND DURABILITY While paper straws may not be as durable as plastic, advancements in their design have improved their strength and resistance to becoming soggy during use.
